pi_items.source: Task description line 2: 'Create a new survey with the title "SaaS Pricing Strategy 2026"' and verified in export_result.sh line 11 which queries for this exact title
Task description line 4.1: 'Code: PREF' and verified in export_result.sh line 32 which queries lime_questions with title='PREF'
Task description line 5.1: 'Code: INTEG' and verified in export_result.sh line 46 which queries lime_questions with title='INTEG'

Task description specifies table rows: Row 1: 'Starter | $29/mo | 1 User', Row 2: 'Pro | $79/mo | 5 Users', Row 3: 'Enterprise | Custom | Unlimited'. All strings in metadata list appear in the table specification. Verified in verifier.py lines 73-82 which checks for these exact strings in the HTML content

Task description line 5: Answer option 'No integrations needed' and CRITICAL CONFIGURATION instruction 'Configure the "No integrations needed" option to be an "Exclusive option"'. Verified in export_result.sh lines 55-58 which queries for answer text matching '%No integrations%' and in verifier.py lines 100-108 which checks exclusive option configuration

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic LimeSurvey survey titled 'SaaS Pricing Strategy 2026' with two questions: Q1 (PREF) is a List/Radio type question containing an HTML table with pricing tiers (Starter at $29/mo, Pro at $79/mo, Enterprise with custom pricing), and Q2 (INTEG) is a Multiple Choice question with integration options including 'No integrations needed' configured as an exclusive option.
